notes: Gate 254 is a prepared handoff workspace refresh, not a GitHub push. The final deliverable is a downloadable zip for Codex.
The workflow bundle AGENTS file was not applied because it would regress the later Gate 253 testing-doctrine read-stack repair.

global_rules.sequential_execution: One leaf at a time. One gate at a time. One branch per gate when later applied in the live repo.
global_rules.anti_drift_closeout: A gate is not closed until repo-root PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, the active leaf ledger, and the active execution log move together.
global_rules.bounded_proof: Gate 254 uses bounded workflow-law, template-pack, and planning-state proof only; no runtime suite.

leaves.title: Refresh workflow law and template pack without regressing the later Gate 253 doctrine repair
leaves.objective: Carry forward the available workflow bundle improvements into the prepared handoff repo while preserving the later AGENTS/testing-doctrine state, recording the contradiction, and packaging the result for Codex.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf reconciles an older workflow-law bundle into a later Gate 253 workspace state. It preserves the later AGENTS/testing-doctrine repair and imports only the non-regressive workflow-law/template-pack additions.
ordered_actions: Inspect the available workflow docs refresh bundle and record the AGENTS contradiction against the later Gate 253 state before mutating repo surfaces.
Preserve repo-root AGENTS.md from Gate 253 unchanged.
Merge the workflow-bundle continuity additions into docs/06_REPO_PROCESS_AND_TRANCHE_LAW.md while preserving docs/08_TESTING_AND_PROMOTION.md authority.
Refresh the tranche briefing template pack to the 2026-04-06 template generation and continuity example.
Update bounded workflow-law/template-pack tests and add a Gate 254 reconciliation test.
Update PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, the leaves ledger, the execution log, the contradiction report, and CHANGELOG.jsonl together, then package the prepared repo handoff for Codex.
forbidden_actions: Do not overwrite repo-root AGENTS.md with the older workflow-bundle AGENTS file.
Do not remove docs/08_TESTING_AND_PROMOTION.md from live process-law or read-stack authority.
Do not widen Gate 254 into runtime/schema/data mutation.
expected_evidence: docs/06 now contains controlled continuity plus retained testing doctrine authority
2026-04-06 template-pack files exist and tests pass
router quartet closed through Gate 254 with no active pack
definition_of_done: The prepared handoff repo reflects Gate 252 plus Gate 253 plus the bounded Gate 254 workflow-law/template-pack refresh.
The workflow bundle AGENTS contradiction is recorded truthfully instead of hidden.
The prepared handoff package is zipped for Codex.
leaves.packaging_requirement: Create a downloadable handoff zip for Codex because GitHub push is unavailable in this environment.

contradiction_scan: The workflow-bundle AGENTS.md hash 505e49bc7e6eb5f03912e8a4d843a5ea671fcb669e1e50cafdce3aca922b0011 conflicts materially with the later Gate 253 AGENTS.md hash 2ea30b3ee36ba778d71262dafd4c5b14ce684099c860474891ae3e2754a514a3; Gate 254 preserves the later AGENTS.md and records the contradiction explicitly.
state_invariants: No active pack is routed after Gate 254 closeout.
Repo-root AGENTS.md remains the later Gate 253 file.
docs/06 retains docs/08_TESTING_AND_PROMOTION.md authority while carrying the continuity additions.
The 2026-04-06 template-pack generation is available for future planning threads.
